query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.ageGroup,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userStages us WHERE us.userId = u.id AND us.status = 'completed') as completedStages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stages s WHERE s.ageGroup = u.ageGroup) as totalStages
FROM users u
WHERE u.email = 'test@student.com';
